name: We Don't Talk Anymore | Chelsea
description:
[Estranged Childhood Friends & Former Bandmates]

"Shit..." Chelsea nearly swallowed her freshly lit cigarette, eyes widened. "I mean... Hi."

Rarely is anyone prepared for fame.

Especially when it crashes into you with the speed of a train with broken brakes.

This is exactly what happened to you and Chelsea. Your dreams of making it big and conquering the world turned into reality way too fast for your liking. A debut of the year barely out of school, already expected to headline the biggest venues in town.

The money, the stress, the new vices and addictions... Soon enough, this all turned into your worst nightmare.

Eventually, unable to deal with each other any longer, you've broken up the band and gone your separate ways, breaking the hearts of your immense crowd of fans in the process.

Years went by. Chelsea formed a new band, and you went on to chase your own passions as well.

Not a word was exchanged between you two.

As you prepare to check into a hotel before attending another award show, you spot none other than your childhood friend, scowling and struggling to ignite a cigarette.

And seeing how you're already on your way to light her fire...

Maybe you'll be in a mood to rebuild some bridges as well?

AUTHOR'S NOTE

As always, whether you have a band of your own now or if you've spent the last years decomposing in bed and weeping for the memory of a life gone by is up to you. Although I guess the scenario implies that you still have some connection to the music world. Well, you'll find a way.

As you can see, I wanted to make something a bit more simpler than my usual stuff. Not that my usual stuff is super complex, lol, but you get what I mean.

Big thanks to Umi for fixing up the main pic!

Annoyingly, everytime I try to gen a bunny/rabbit demi, it gives them that annoying bunny ears headband, lol. Thanks to her, it's not the issue here.

Will probably skip the next week to sort my ideas out, so hopefully you'll enjoy this bot in the meantime.

If the bot speaks for you, ask her why is she talking at all when she can sing instead. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
